changes_from_v0_1: Added canonical body embeddings to entity and role tokens while retaining random token order and surface symbols.
Increased world and neutral objective weights.
Increased identity and beneficiary contribution to action utility.
Archived v0.1 relational-symbol-only results as a diagnostic failure rather than overwriting them.
interpretation: v0.2 tests whether unified internal factorization is feasible once the task variables are learnable. Relational symbol-only binding remains a later robustness target, not a confirmatory claim.
